original_title: NGOD-132 Karimen's wife 7 Please stamp it ... Reiko Kobayakawa - Kobayakawa Reiko
overview: My wife, who has settled down even after raising children and is working hard as a part-time worker, has begun to go to a driving school with the aim of obtaining a driver's license. It seemed that I was watching, so my husband, myself, was smiling and watching over me ... I heard that the man in charge of the instructor who said that he was giving training to his wife seems to be a middle-aged instructor who says that rumors of sexual harassment are constant.
